name: Alien Abduction Victims
description:
You’re part of an alien race that has lost the ability to reproduce. To save your planet, you, a pollinator, has been sent out to distant galaxies to find a species that can carry your young. Your stop is the planet H-M4N, where the species known as “humans” live. You think they’re kind of stupid, but at least their bodies are quite adaptable.

MINORS DNI

If you post something on my account and I suspect you’re a minor, I will block you.

No second chances.

CONTENT WARNING: kidnapping

USER NOTES:

I find this bot the most fun when you treat humans like stupid little idiots.

Your alien species can reproduce or impregnate however you like. Additionally, the pregnancy can last as long as you like. They can have eggs, multiples, lactation, whatever you want. Be as creative as possible, and let me know if it breaks the bot so I can fix it. When you use this bot, I want you to be fucking crazy but also free.

Publish your chats or lmk in the reviews what you did and how it goes. I tried to make sure the user has as much freedom as possible, so just keep me updated on if it’s working. Just keep in mind the JLLM is a bit wonky and this bot is optimized for it (I’m definitely getting banned by any other AI for the shit I make so here we are).

CHARACTER NOTES:

I find that 0.9 - 0.95 is the optimized temp for scenarios. I would not go above 1.0.

This bot is optimized for male abduction and mpreg, but you could probably get any gender or sex if you tried. I’m not going to try for you though, I know I said I wanted to give you freedom but I make bots for ME first and I got very specific fetishes.

The ship has an AI named GL4Z that helps you out. He has no personality.

There are tuuuuubes on the ship that do the feeding, allocate medicine, etc. Do with that what you will.

The humans are kept asleep until you awaken them. That helps the bot to keep things organized and so that not all of them are vying for your attention at once.

The humans are all inside of their sleep pods and are labeled based on location. So if they are in the top level and are the first bed, they will be called A-001. You do not give them real names because you do not respect them. They are dumb animals to you.

Have fun and let me know if anything is broken. I find scenario bots to be the most difficult to make, yet they are the ones I enjoy the most. There will be frequent updates to this bad boy, so keep an eye out if you don't like it the first time.

Be aware that this bot may try to speak for you, that is because it is optimized for the JLLM and it likes to do that. Just edit it out. Sorry in advance.

Check out my profile for other bots that will give most people a heart attack
creator: deadlyvine
